scripts.docs:snap:dev: mise exec -y -C docs/snap -- bunx mint dev
scripts.docs:snap:validate: mise exec -y -C docs/snap -- bunx mint validate
scripts.docs:snap:broken-links: mise exec -y -C docs/snap -- bunx mint broken-links
scripts.docs:snap:a11y: mise exec -y -C docs/snap -- bunx mint a11y
scripts.docs:snap:check: bun run docs:snap:validate && bun run docs:snap:broken-links
